summary: Excellent high‑fidelity audience recording of a delightfully loose LI show featuring a standout Estimated Prophet solo
review: Harry Morgan raves about this field (audience) tape, calling it a high‑quality capture that rewards playback on a good hi‑fi system. He notes the band was clearly feeding off the crowd, with a particularly memorable Jerry/Bob interaction during the Estimated Prophet solo, making for an enjoyable if not “greatest ever” performance.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one detailed review but it is overwhelmingly positive about both the musical performance and the audience recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Field recording praised for fidelity; taper described as experienced, resulting in clear, well‑balanced sound that captures crowd response nicely.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Band appears tuned‑in and feeding love back to the audience; performance described as a fun ride with moments of edge‑of‑collapse energy that resolve into a satisfying whole.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His solo in Estimated Prophet is highlighted, with speculation about his interplay with Bob during that moment.
band_member_comments.Bob: Mentioned for the interaction with Jerry during the Estimated Prophet solo.
